ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vacancies" (
  "vacancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vacancy */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the judge who created the vacancy */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the vacancy (e.g., Senior, Resigned, Retired) */,
  "vacancy_date" TEXT /* Date the vacancy was created */,
  "circuit" TEXT /* Circuit where the vacancy occurred */,
  "court" TEXT /* Court where the vacancy occurred */,
  "vacancy_type" TEXT /* Type of the vacancy (e.g., Senior, Resigned, Retired) */,
  "expected_fill_date" TEXT /* Expected date when the vacancy will be filled */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the vacancy record was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vacancy (e.g., Open, Filled, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacancies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES judges ("judge_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "vacancy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vacancy the nomination is for */,
  "nominee" TEXT /* Name of the nominee */,
  "nomination_date" TEXT /* Date the nomination was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the nomination (e.g., Pending, Confirmed, Declined) */,
  "nomination_type" TEXT /* Type of the nomination (e.g., Internal, External) */,
  "nomination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the nomination */,
  "expected_confirmation_date" TEXT /* Expected date of confirmation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the nomination record was updated */,
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the nominee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_vacancy_id FOREIGN KEY ("vacancy_id") REFERENCES vacancies ("vacancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_nominee_id FOREIGN KEY ("nominee_id") REFERENCES nominees ("nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nomination_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination the status change is for */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the nomination */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status change occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the status change */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the status change */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the status change record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nomination_status_history_nomination_id FOREIGN KEY ("nomination_id") REFERENCES nominations ("nomination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "court" TEXT /* Court where the judge serves */,
  "circuit" TEXT /* Circuit where the judge serves */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the judge was appointed */,
  "tenure_end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the judge's tenure */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the judge record was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the judge (e.g., Active, Retired, Deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominees" (
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nominee */,
  "nominee_name" TEXT /* Name of the nominee */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the nominee */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the nominee was appointed, if applicable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the nominee record was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the nominee (e.g., Pending, Confirmed, Declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agency staff, judge, stakeholder) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last time the user was active in the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the access log record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
